title: Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Recessed COB Downlight
description: The SL MX 691 Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Recessed COB Downlight is a high-performance lighting solution designed specifically for areas exposed to moisture, humidity, and challenging environments. Powered by a premium USA CREE LED, this 10.5W downlight delivers reliable illumination with superior brightness and efficiency. With its IP65 rating, it is perfectly suited for steam rooms, washrooms, and other damp areas while maintaining long-term durability and consistent lighting output.

details.Product Details: The SL MX 691 downlight is crafted for moisture-prone areas where standard lighting cannot perform efficiently. Its recessed round design provides a clean and modern finish, making it ideal for architectural integration.
details.Premium Construction: Constructed with robust materials and available in both white and black finishes, the fixture not only delivers functional lighting but also complements interior aesthetics. Its IP65 rating ensures protection against dust and water jets, making it dependable for long-term use in humid environments.
details.Lighting Performance: Powered by a high-quality 10.5W USA CREE LED, the downlight delivers a focused 24° beam angle. This ensures precise illumination with minimal glare, creating a comfortable and visually appealing ambiance even in spaces with steam or water exposure.
details.Easy Installation: The compact size of 84 × 65MM with a 75MM cut-out makes the SL MX 691 simple to install in ceilings. Its recessed structure ensures seamless integration without disturbing the room’s design.
details.Versatile Application: Designed for steam rooms, washrooms, spas, and wellness centers, the SL MX 691 combines durability with elegance. It is also suitable for other indoor areas requiring moisture-resistant, high-quality lighting.

title: Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Recessed COB Downlight
description: The SL MX 692 Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Recessed COB Downlight is an advanced 18W lighting solution designed for environments with high moisture and humidity. Utilizing premium USA CREE LED technology, this downlight ensures excellent brightness, energy efficiency, and durability. Its IP65 rating provides full protection against dust and water exposure, making it a reliable choice for demanding applications such as steam rooms, washrooms, spas, and wellness areas.

details.Product Details: The SL MX 692 is specifically engineered for use in areas where regular lighting fails due to moisture and steam. Its recessed round design allows seamless ceiling integration, providing an elegant and unobtrusive look.
details.Premium Construction: Manufactured with robust materials and offered in both white and black finishes, this downlight is built to last. The IP65 enclosure guarantees protection against water and dust, ensuring consistent performance in wet and humid conditions.
details.Lighting Performance: Equipped with a powerful 18W USA CREE LED, the downlight delivers a warm 3000K glow with a concentrated 24° beam angle. This ensures precise directional lighting with minimal glare, perfect for highlighting functional spaces while maintaining comfort.
details.Easy Installation: With dimensions of 104 × 70MM and a 95MM cut-out, the SL MX 692 is simple to install in standard ceilings. Its recessed form factor enhances aesthetics while maximizing lighting performance.
details.Versatile Application: Perfectly suited for steam rooms, bathrooms, spas, wellness centers, and other high-moisture spaces. Its superior build quality, focused beam, and reliable operation make it a trusted choice for both residential and commercial projects.

title: Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Surface COB Downlight
description: The SL 887 Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Surface COB Downlight is a compact and reliable 5W lighting fixture designed for humid and moisture-prone environments. Using advanced COB BridgeLux LED technology, it provides powerful illumination while maintaining energy efficiency. With an IP65 rating, this surface-mounted downlight is protected against water and dust, making it ideal for bathrooms, steam rooms, spas, and other high-humidity areas.

details.Product Details: The SL 887 is engineered for challenging environments where traditional lighting may fail. Its surface-mounted round design ensures easy installation and a sleek appearance that blends well with modern interiors.
details.Premium Construction: Built with durable materials and available in both white and black finishes, the SL 887 is designed to withstand continuous exposure to moisture. The IP65 rating ensures reliable protection from water jets and dust ingress, extending its service life.
details.Lighting Performance: Featuring a high-quality 5W COB BridgeLux LED, the downlight produces a warm 3000K glow that creates a relaxing and welcoming ambiance. Its efficient light distribution ensures balanced illumination without harsh glare.
details.Easy Installation: Compact in size (60 × 15MM), the SL 887 is easy to surface-mount in various ceiling types. Its low-profile build ensures it does not disrupt the overall aesthetics of the space.
details.Versatile Application: Perfect for steam rooms, bathrooms, spas, wellness centers, and other high-moisture locations. Its durable build and reliable performance make it an excellent choice for both residential and commercial installations.

title: Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Surface COB Downlight
description: The SL 887 Steam Room/Wash Room IP65 Surface COB Downlight (10W) is a high-performance surface-mounted luminaire engineered specifically for humid and moisture-prone environments. Utilizing advanced COB BridgeLux technology, this 10W unit delivers bright, uniform illumination while remaining energy-efficient. With an IP65 rating and robust construction, the SL 887 is ideal for bathrooms, steam rooms, spas, and other wet-area applications where reliable, long-lasting lighting is essential.

details.Product Details: The SL 887 combines a low-profile surface-mounted design with powerful COB lighting output to provide an elegant and unobtrusive lighting solution for wet areas. Its round shape and compact footprint allow it to be used in both modern and traditional interiors, delivering functional task lighting as well as soft ambient illumination.
details.Premium Construction: Constructed from durable materials with corrosion-resistant finishes available in white and black, the SL 887 is built to withstand continuous exposure to moisture. The IP65-rated housing protects internal components from dust and water jets, ensuring long operational life and minimal maintenance.
details.Lighting Performance: Equipped with a 10W COB BridgeLux LED, the fixture produces a stable 3000K warm-white output with excellent color rendering and minimal glare. The optical design ensures even light distribution suitable for close-ceiling applications, creating comfortable and visually pleasing environments.
details.Easy Installation: With a compact size of 100 × 15MM, the SL 887 is straightforward to surface-mount on various ceiling types. Its slim profile simplifies installation and integration into existing fixtures or new builds without requiring extensive ceiling depth.
details.Versatile Application: Perfect for steam rooms, washrooms, shower zones (protected locations), spas, changing rooms, and other high-humidity interiors. The SL 887 offers reliability and aesthetic appeal for both residential and commercial wellness projects.
